name: Wordpress With Mysql
tagline: WordPress is open source software you can use to create a beautiful website, blog, or app.
description:
WordPress is open source software you can use to create a beautiful website, blog, or app.

Docs: https://wordpress.org?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  wordpress:
    image: wordpress:latest
    volumes:
      - wordpress-files:/var/www/html
    environment:
      - WORDPRESS_DB_HOST=mysql
      - WORDPRESS_DB_USER=uca2b499035
      - WORDPRESS_DB_PASSWORD=a25a82563daff7f9c14e1208d0f63c67
      - WORDPRESS_DB_NAME=wordpress
    depends_on:
      - mysql
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42142:80
  mysql:
    image: mysql:8
    volumes:
      - mysql-data:/var/lib/mysql
    environment:
      - MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=6d0c48bee41eeb9fdd009c60d524124e
      - MYSQL_DATABASE=wordpress
      - MYSQL_USER=uca2b499035
      - MYSQL_PASSWORD=a25a82563daff7f9c14e1208d0f63c67
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - mysqladmin
        - ping
        - -h
        - 127.0.0.1
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  wordpress-files: null
  mysql-data: null
